title: Employee Value Proposition Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Employee Value Proposition skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

employee_research_data.description: Employee research data: engagement survey results, exit interview themes, or focus group findings on what employees value and where the organization falls short

voluntary_attrition_rate.description: Voluntary attrition rate by role, level, and tenure versus sector benchmarks

current_compensation_benefits.description: Current compensation and benefits data benchmarked against the relevant talent market

defined_target_talent.description: Defined target talent segments by role type, career stage, or strategic skill category

competitor_employer_brand.description: Competitor employer brand analysis showing how peer organizations position their EVP in the talent market

employer_review_platform.description: Employer review platform data (Glassdoor, LinkedIn) synthesizing unsolicited employee sentiment

current_recruitment_conversion.description: Current recruitment conversion data showing where candidates drop out of the hiring process
